description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended outward. She is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and a knee-length skirt, paired with high-heeled sandals. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, and her facial features are softly defined. The clothing fits closely to her body, accentuating her form, and the shoes have thin straps and elevated heels. The overall appearance is casual yet stylish, suitable for an urban environment such as a city street or park. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A standing adult woman in a sleeveless top, knee-length skirt, and high-heeled sandals with her hair in a bun. She has a casual, urban appearance and a slender build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sleeveless top, skirt, and high-heeled sandals, with arms extended outward and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the bun hairstyle, and the side silhouette of the outfit and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with the bun, the back of the sleeveless top, and the skirt's fit.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the bun hairstyle, and the side silhouette of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and knee-length skirt
